reference: I am sorry to hear about your situation. A blockage of forty% is not considered significant. I would like to know about the status of other arteries as well; there might be blockages in other arteries for which surgery is advised. Therefore, without knowing the full coronary angiography report, it is difficult to comment. I would like to inform you that having surgery with heart function at twenty-five% is always a high-risk procedure, including the possibility of death on the operating table.
text: I am sorry to hear about the situation. A blockage of forty percent is not considered significant. I have let you know that the status of other arteries is known. There might be blockages in other arteries for which surgery is advised. Therefore, without knowing the full foreign area geology report, it is difficult to comment. I have got to inform you that having surgery with heart function at any time of the month is always a high risk procedure, including the possibility of death on the operating table.
